versions.summary: Tasks page polish: separate view from filter, sortable column headers, properly responsive on phones and tablets

changes.description: View toggle on the Tasks page is now display-mode only (List or Board). The 'Incomplete' option moved to a filter chip alongside Overdue — it composes with both views and with all other filters. Board view + Incomplete chip drops the Completed and Cancelled columns so you see only what's open, in kanban form.

Click any column header in the list view to sort by that column. The cycle is unsorted → ascending → descending → unsorted. Active column shows an up/down chevron and screen readers hear an aria-sort announcement on every state change. Sortable: Title, Area, Type, Priority, Status, Due. Tags is intentionally not sortable (multi-valued).
Sort and all active filters are preserved when you toggle list/board, switch areas, or click a column header — no more silent drops when changing one filter.
Status dropdown is always visible — previously it was hidden in 'incomplete view' mode, which made it impossible to drill from a per-status dashboard tile to a single-status incomplete list.
Dashboard sub-tile and Overdue card drill-throughs now use ?incomplete=true&… instead of ?view=incomplete&… — old URLs no longer work but no one had bookmarked them.

Tasks list no longer overflows horizontally at standard desktop widths. The new sortable column headers were rendering an inactive chevron next to every label, which added ~90px to the table width across six columns. Inactive chevrons are now hidden — only the active sort column shows an up/down arrow. Cursor-pointer plus a hover color change still signals clickability on the other headers.

Tasks list is properly responsive on phones and tablets — no more horizontal scrollbar at any width from 320px (iPhone SE) up. The list reflows into a 2-line card layout below 640px (title + status on top, priority + due date underneath, with a Sort ▼ button replacing the desktop column headers). On tablets, less-essential columns (Area, Type, Tags) hide automatically; on desktop everything stays visible. Built on Bootstrap responsive utilities so column visibility lives in one place per cell. Verified by Playwright tests at 10 viewport widths from 320px through 1440px.

versions.summary: Changelog page now sorts versions numerically (1.10 above 1.8)

changes.description: What's New / Changelog page sorts releases by version number, not alphabetically. Previously v1.10 appeared below v1.8 because '1.10' is lexicographically less than '1.8' — fixed by parsing each version into a (major, minor, patch) tuple and sorting numerically.

versions.summary: Incomplete view (with Overdue) + Tag editing in Settings

changes.description: New Incomplete view on /tasks: third toggle alongside list/board, flat single-column list of NotStarted/InProgress/Blocked tasks sorted by priority then target-date nulls-last, deep-linkable as ?view=incomplete[&status=…]

Overdue filter chip composes with all other filters; row-level Overdue pill renders next to the date on desktop/tablet and collapses to a red-dot prefix on mobile (with screen-reader companion text — never color-alone)
Dashboard Incomplete by Status card with three click-through sub-tiles (Not Started / In Progress / Blocked); existing Overdue summary card now drills through to /tasks?view=incomplete&overdue=true

Settings tag editing: pencil affordance on each chip opens an inline edit row with name + colour, cascading-effect hint ("used by N tasks — changes apply everywhere"), duplicate-name inline error, and a fully keyboard-only editing path
REST API: PUT /api/v1/tags/{id} for renaming/recolouring tags; GET /api/v1/tags now returns taskCount per tag

Settings page handlers (Create + Update tag) now run FluentValidation on every submit — tampered forms with over-length names or non-hex colours are rejected with a clear inline error instead of silent EF truncation

Tasks page view toggle and area chips use Url.Page so switching list/board/incomplete or area preserves all active filters (search, type, tags, priority, overdue, status) and properly URL-encodes special characters
Overdue filter (?overdueOnly=true) now correctly excludes Completed and Cancelled tasks, matching the stats card and row-level pill semantics

versions.summary: Health & Diagnostics — self-describing binary, post-deploy smoke tests

changes.description: New /health page: anonymous public dashboard showing overall status (HEALTHY/DEGRADED/UNHEALTHY), per-check results, version, git commit, build timestamp, and uptime — auto-refreshes every 30s
REST health endpoints: /api/v1/health/version, /live, /ready, /full, /assets — all anonymous, all return standard ApiResponse envelope
Build-time git stamping: version, commit SHA, and build timestamp baked into the assembly at compile time — the binary is now the authoritative source of version truth
7 health check components: database, migrations, config, auth-handlers, mcp, temp-writable, assembly-metadata — required failures return 503; optional failures return 200 degraded
Static asset fingerprint manifest at /api/v1/health/assets — returns SHA-256 hashes for all tracked CSS/JS files, enabling smoke tests to verify CDN serves the correct assets
Post-deploy smoke script (scripts/smoke.ps1) verifies correct version is deployed, full health is green, no CDN caching, and asset manifest matches served assets
Sidebar version pill now shows v{Version} · {GitCommitShort} from the assembly (not app-changelog.json) and links to /health
Health endpoints excluded from API audit log to prevent Azure App Service health probe noise
Mobile layout (≤640px): fixed top bar with hamburger, slide-in sidebar overlay, backdrop dismiss
Tablet layout (641–1024px): icon-only sidebar rail (60px), full sidebar collapses to icons with tooltips
Content padding reduced to 16px on mobile, 24px on tablet
Stats grid: 2-column on mobile, charts stack to single column on mobile/tablet
Kanban board collapses to single column on mobile
All tables (Dashboard, Tasks, Audit, Integrations) wrapped with horizontal scroll for mobile
Filters bar: search box no longer has fixed min-width, quick-add stacks vertically on mobile
Touch targets increased to 44px minimum for nav links and buttons on mobile
Color swatches enlarged to 28px on mobile

versions.summary: MCP Server — connect Claude Desktop directly

changes.description: Native MCP server live at /mcp — connect Claude Desktop, Claude.ai Projects, or any MCP-compatible agent directly to TaskPilot using your existing API key
9 MCP tools: list_tasks, get_task, create_task, update_task, complete_task, delete_task, get_stats, list_tags, list_task_types
Integrations page MCP section updated from 'Coming Soon' to live — includes Claude Desktop config block with copy button
REST API Reference on the Integrations page corrected: stats endpoint is /api/v1/tasks/stats, not /api/v1/stats
Creating a task with Completed status now correctly sets CompletedDate — it was previously null, so the task did not appear in the dashboard's 'Completed Today' count
Editing a task's status to Completed via the edit form or API PATCH/PUT also now sets CompletedDate if it was not already set
New Integrations page — step-by-step setup guides for connecting Claude, OpenAI/GPT, and any LLM to TaskPilot via the REST API
Copy-ready Claude tool definitions and OpenAI function definitions included on the Integrations page
MCP (Model Context Protocol) support coming soon — placeholder added to Integrations page
Swagger / API Docs link added to the sidebar nav and Settings page (visible in development mode only)
Tags are now visible throughout the UI — add tags to tasks, filter by tag, and see top tags on the dashboard
Task Type is now a dropdown (Task, Goal, Habit, Meeting, Note, Event) replacing the old free-form text field
Area field (Personal / Work) added to every task — filter your list and see completion split on the dashboard
Activity log now records task creation ('Created' entry)
Activity log records task deletion — visible even after soft-delete
Complete task log no longer incorrectly shows Completed → Completed
Patch endpoint now logs individual field changes instead of a generic 'patch' entry

versions.summary: Unified Audit area and Activity Log API

changes.description: New GET /api/v1/activity-logs endpoint — paginated, filterable task history
Audit page redesigned with two tabs: Task History and API Access
Task detail page shows a Change History table with per-field edits
Activity log filters by task, field, date range, and changed-by
Task management: create, edit, complete, delete with soft-delete
Dashboard with live stats: active, overdue, in-progress, blocked, by type and priority
Kanban board view and list view with search and filters
Tags with colour coding
Recurring tasks with daily, weekly, and monthly patterns
API key management with HMAC-SHA256 hashing
API audit log: every API key request is recorded
Settings page: profile, password, appearance, API keys
Cookie auth for web UI, X-Api-Key header for REST API
